---
title: "Omid Rohanian"
subtitle: 'Assistant Professor · SODAS, University of Copenhagen<br><span class="research-areas">NLP · Biomedical AI · Social Data Science</span>'
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      url: https://www.linkedin.com/in/omidrohanian/
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      url: https://x.com/omidrohanian
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      url: https://github.com/omidrohanian
    - text: "Email"
      icon: envelope
      url: mailto:mro@sodas.ku.dk
    - text: "Google Scholar"
      icon: google-scholar
      url: https://scholar.google.co.uk/citations?user=dwWwU0UAAAAJ&hl=en
image: img/omid_rohanian.jpg
comments: false
---

I am an Assistant Professor at the Copenhagen Center for Social Data Science (SODAS), University of Copenhagen. My research sits at the intersection of natural language processing, machine learning, biomedical AI, and social data science.

On this site, I share project updates, research notes, publications, and occasional writing on NLP, language models, biomedical and clinical text processing, and the use of AI in scientific and social contexts.
